scripts.test:allure: rm -rf allure-results && npx playwright test; TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?; npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && npx allure open allure-report; exit $TEST_EXIT_CODE
scripts.allure:report: npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && npx allure open allure-report
